_comment: bg.weird (background.scripts, manifest walk) and logic.data + mod.txt (<script src> walk) are loaded but not reviewed as code -> unrecognized-file-type flags all three. The <script> walk classifies against JS_EXTENSIONS (a <script src> is CODE whatever the suffix), so mod.txt - a recognized resource type - is still flagged because it is executed as a script. icon.png (a manifest icon, recognized) is NOT flagged. input:xpi -> file-level findings.
